title: Payment Trust - 1.0.8.55
summary: Tips, insurance, and sign-up now behave honestly. Tipping your responder works again, insurance changes stop reporting false failures, new sign-ups reach the registration steps, and the payment sheet can no longer strand you mid-payment. Wallet top-up is temporarily unavailable while we finish it - your card is never charged.

changes.message: Tipping a responder after a visit works again - the tip now reaches your provider instead of failing silently.
Adding or removing insurance no longer reports a failure after it has already saved, so policies stop getting duplicated.
New sign-ups reach the name, date-of-birth, and password steps instead of being treated as returning users.
The payment sheet can no longer lock up: a slow settlement stays dismissible, a declined payment says so plainly, and the pay button never gets stuck.
Card handling is tidier - adding a card sets exactly one default, and cash is only offered when it can actually be verified.
Wallet top-up is temporarily unavailable and says so honestly. Your card is not charged while it is off.
